title: The Protagonish
short_description: Play as 4 NPCs and choose to help or hinder an adventurer in this short hand-drawn, fully voice acted point-and-click adventure with multiple paths and endings.
description: Play 4 'NPCs' and choose to help or hinder the adventurer, in this very short 20 min hand-drawn, fully voice acted point-and-click adventure with a twist. Take control of the villagers in a medieval fantasy village, and decide to help or halt the adventurer's quest, with multiple paths and endings.
